DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DELOITTE & TOUCHE LLP'S DEMURRER TO THE FIFTH AND SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION IN PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302.
